subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast arisen to serve the Cause of God and hath rendered service to the Word of God! The letters which, through Jinab-i-Aqa Sayfullah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استقام علی امر الله و خدم کلمه الله کتبی که به واسطه جناب آقا سیف الله
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @review of publications
